content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 19, 2001

Diana Phillips, Staff Assistant
Office of the Governor
State Capitol
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File Number: W-01-092

Dear Ms. Phillips:

As you are aware, we have been working with you in response to your letter requesting assistance with the filing requirements for appointees of newly created boards and commissions. Your letter to us was initially treated as a request for written advice, however, due to the ongoing nature of this project, please consider this correspondence as formal notification that your advice request has been withdrawn.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

MLM:jg
